     The Numbers Business Report

A Haunted House (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $40,041,683Details
International Box Office $19,880,875
Worldwide Box Office $59,922,558
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,356,497
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,158,836
Total $9,515,333
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Young couple Malcolm and Kisha have just moved in to their dream house. As they settle in, they quickly find they’re not alone. But it's not the house that's haunted, it's Malcolm’s girlfriend who is possessed by a demon. Malcolm hires everyone from a priest to modern day ghostbusters to rid her of this unwelcome intruder, determined not to let the evil spirit ruin his relationship... or, more importantly, his sex life.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,101,682 (45.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.21 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$2,500,000 (worldwide box office is 24.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,160 opening theaters/2,160 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,905,105

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 11th, 2013 (Wide) by Open Road
International Releases: January 16th, 2013 (Wide) (Philippines)
January 17th, 2013 (Wide) (Italy)
January 17th, 2013 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
January 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Singapore)
February 1st, 2013 (Wide) (Brazil)
Video Release: April 23rd, 2013 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude and sexual content, language and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2246, 10/24/2012)
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: A Haunted House
Cast, crew, or production detail: Found Footage, Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: Haunting, Paranormal Investigation, Possessed, Psychics, Religious, Spoof
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Open Road Films, IM Global, Endgame Entertainment, Automatik, Baby Way
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Malcolm hires everyone from a priest to modern day ghostbusters to rid her of this unwelcome intruder, determined not to let the evil spirit ruin his relationship... or, more importantly, his sex life.
